result.summary: Mapped 13 Abstract API HTTP API surfaces plus the curated IP Geolocation OpenAPI spec; all documented surfaces use per-product API keys, with Email Reputation additionally supporting Bearer header and POST body auth; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface found.

abstract_api_key.label: Per-API Abstract API key
abstract_api_key.setup: Sign in to the [Abstract dashboard](https://app.abstractapi.com/dashboard), open the product/API you want to use, and copy its API key. Abstract states that **each API has its own unique key**, so you mint/copy a separate key for Email Reputation, IP Intelligence, Company Enrichment, etc.
